text: What's one thing that went well today?
How would you describe your energy level right now?
choices: Wired — I could keep going for hours

text: What's keeping you up right now? Be honest.
What's the most important thing you need to do tomorrow?
How does your screen time tonight make you feel?
What would you need to let go of to sleep peacefully right now?
Will staying up another hour be worth it tomorrow morning?
choices: Yes, I have a good reason
